description: Reusable visual patterns or object categories that occur across many varieties of components. Distinct from components, which are specific UI elements.

values.label: Container
values.description: Enclosing structure that holds child elements

values.label: List
values.description: Ordered or unordered collection of items

values.label: Accessory
values.description: Supplementary element attached to a primary structure

values.label: Group
values.description: Collection of similar UI elements or related controls

values.label: Banner
values.description: Prominent element for displaying non-permanent information or actions

values.label: Table
values.description: Tabular layout of rows and columns for structured data

values.label: Body
values.description: Body text typography scale — used for standard paragraph and UI text

values.label: Detail
values.description: Detail text typography scale — used for captions, labels, and supporting text

values.label: Heading
values.description: Heading text typography scale — used for section and page headings

values.label: Drop Shadow
values.description: Elevated shadow effect applied to components and containers
